creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Unfortunately, this fails to build in Poudriere with a bunch of missing files in pkg-plist:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: man/man1/rubymine.1.gz
Error: Orphaned: share/applications/rubymine.desktop
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/plugins/terminal/fish/config.fish
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%DATADIR%%/jre
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

You can manually run 'make check-plist' to catch stuff like this without Poudriere or Synth.

Can you also please provide a diff instead of a shar next time for port updates?
